channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Black tarmac used to patch/deface multimillion pound cycleway., 1st May
item.description:
Junction Hillcourt Road/Evesham Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131, Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Lights not working, 1st May
item.description:
The first 2 Street lights on the cycle path are not working, maybe have never worked. This is the part of the cycle path starting opposite the coop and going to Gotherington.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gotherington Lane, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large area of broken surface, 1st May
item.description:
In the middle of the junction if turning RIGHT into Telstar Way. VERY DANGEROUS for motorcycle as vulnerable road users - needs a priority action to prevent an accident
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Telstar Way, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 1st May
item.description:
Good afternoon, I am forwarding this to you to see if it is something your department could possible reply to. I have not included the sender at this stage in the reply. If it is not for you can you please send to the relevant department.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working
